env_vars.name: PCG_DISABLE_NEO4J
env_vars.note: skip graph driver in local-lightweight profile

adr_references.what_it_says: PCG_GRAPH_BACKEND selection and NornicDB promotion gates

lifecycle_summary: main calls telemetry.NewBootstrap then telemetry.NewProviders for OTEL setup, then wireAPI to open Postgres and the Neo4j/NornicDB driver. It builds an http.Server on PCG_API_ADDR wrapped in otelhttp middleware and listens until SIGINT or SIGTERM, at which point it attempts a 5-second graceful shutdown.

entry_points.name: main
entry_points.role: process entry; boots telemetry, calls wireAPI, starts HTTP server

entry_points.name: wireAPI
entry_points.role: wires all dependencies: opens Postgres, optional graph driver, builds query.APIRouter, mounts admin surface, wraps with auth

entry_points.name: newRouter
entry_points.role: constructs query.APIRouter with all handler structs wired to concrete adapters

entry_points.name: mountRuntimeSurface
entry_points.role: calls internalruntime.NewStatusAdminMux to compose admin routes with the API handler

entry_points.name: openQueryGraph
entry_points.role: opens the graph driver or returns nil for local-lightweight profile

openapi_surface: OpenAPI spec is assembled and served by internal/query. The cmd/api binary does not generate OpenAPI directly; it mounts query.APIRouter which registers GET /api/v0/openapi.json via query.ServeOpenAPI.
